Three infinitely long circular cylinders each with unit radius have their axes
along the $x$, $y$ and $z$-axes. Determine the volume of the region common to
all three cylinders. (Thus one needs the volume common to $\lbrace y^2 + z^2
\le 1\rbrace$, $\lbrace z^2 + x^2 \le 1\rbrace$, $\lbrace x^2 + y^2 \le
1\rbrace$.)
